headline: JP Morgan Maintains Overweight on Estee Lauder Cos, Lowers Price Target to $98
summary: JP Morgan  analyst Andrea Teixeira   maintains Estee Lauder Cos (NYSE:EL) with a Overweight and lowers the price target from $121 to $98.

headline: Jim Cramer's top 10 things to watch in the stock market Friday
summary: The S&P 500 was up early this morning after President Trump said that the U.S.-Iran war "should be ending pretty soon."

headline: A Look At Estée Lauder (EL) Valuation After Recent Share Price Volatility
summary: Event context and why Estée Lauder is on investors’ radar Estée Lauder Companies (EL) is back in focus after recent trading left the shares with a 15% decline over the past month and a 35% decline over the past 3 months, despite a positive 1 year total return. See our latest analysis for Estée Lauder Companies. The recent volatility sits against a mixed backdrop, with a 2.8% 7 day share price gain, a 30 day share price return of a 15.3% decline, and a 1 year total shareholder return of 40.5%,...
